evals.name: trigger-dark-mode-toggle
evals.prompt: How do I add a button that toggles between light and dark theme in the app?

assertions.text: Notes the dark theme overrides surface/background/on-* colors

evals.name: trigger-defaults-and-utilities
evals.prompt: How are per-component defaults configured in createVuetify, and which utility class sets margin to 16px on all sides?

assertions.text: Explains defaults are defined in createVuetify({ defaults: {...} })
States ma-4 produces margin 16px on all sides

evals.name: negative-color-token-name
evals.prompt: Which color token name should I pass to color= for a destructive delete button?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-theming; routes to vuetify-overview instead
